hitchens_question: When did we become so inured to the grotesque that we can read about "one-way attack drones" and "banned submunitions" in the same breath as rescue operations, as if the machinery of slaughter and salvation were morally equivalent entries in some cosmic ledger? The Pentagon's preferred munitions for suicide drones merit the same column inches as heroic rescues at sea—both filed under the bloodless category of "defense news"—while we pretend this normalization of automated killing doesn't reveal something unspeakable about what we've allowed ourselves to become. Tell me again how we're the ones bringing civilization to the world's dark corners.
